title: 轨道数据中心面临太空挑战：SpaceX 计划部署 100 GW AI 算力
full_text:
Jun 5th, 2026
Orbital Data Centers Face Space-Based Challenges
Philip Johnston, Starcloud CEO, joins to discuss the challenges of building and maintaining orbital data centers in space, this as SpaceX says it wants to ultimately deploy 100 gigawatts of AI compute capacity in orbit. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech."
Duration: 10:14
Strong Jobs Report Boosts Bets on Fed Rate Hike
Duration: 1:20
Nvidia Clears ‘Big Three’ for Vera Rubin HBM4 Supply
Duration: 3:53
Fed Is in No Hurry to Raise Rates, BlackRock's Rosenberg Says
Duration: 2:54
Sports City: The World Cup Keeps Getting Bigger
Duration: 3:13
Rick Rieder Likens US Economy to 'Three-Month-Old Birthday Cake'
Duration: 1:59
SpaceX IPO Denied Fast Track Entry by S&P
Duration: 1:56
Semiconductor Stocks Got 'Over Their Skis,' Strategist Bartels Says
Duration: 1:41
Inflation Doesn’t Need a Big Response, Economist Roth Says
